name: Ben Carson
subject: A special message for you...
body:
| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596634:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r)
---
|

Peter,

Now that I've announced my campaign for President, I've hit the road and am currently traveling through the early primary states of Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

[**I hope you have one minute free, because I 've recorded my first short message for you as a candidate from the road, which you can watch here**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596634:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r).

| [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596634:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r)
---

Everyone has been extremely kind and welcoming, with great questions and even better suggestions for how we fix our nation's problems.

This is my first campaign, and I've been told over and again how difficult it will be.

I don't doubt it -- but I cannot help but be energized by the people I'm meeting.

While they're clearly fed up with the political class in both parties, they are optimistic and ready to forge a new path forward. Well so am I.

Peter, I'm not a politician. I don't want to be a politician because politicians do what is politically expedient.

I'm running for President because I want to do what's right.

[**Please take one short minute to watch my special video message for you right now, and help support our campaign with a donation**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596634:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r).

Thank you, and I'll talk to you very soon.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596634:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596635:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596636:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596637:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596638:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/27596639:26545029260:m:1:876315805:7F04550B4DFDD7F25121391750654294:r)
---|---|---|---

name: Josh Wolf, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: We have an opponent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| It's official. Patrick has an extreme right-wing opponent: GOP Rep. Ron DeSantis.Friend -- It's official. Patrick has an extreme Republican opponent: GOP Rep. Ron DeSantis. Ron DeSantis is the poster child for Washington's dysfunction. He's embraced a radical Tea Party agenda that has ties to the Koch Brothers' dark money group Americans for Prosperity. He's anti-choice, opposes same sex marriage, and voted NO on reauthorizing the Violence Against Women Act. **Florida deserves better from its next U.S. Senator.** Patrick can beat DeSantis or anyone else who enters this race. But ultra conservative groups -- including the Club for Growth -- have already announced that DeSantis will have their financial backing. Unless we all do our part to strengthen this campaign, we won't have the resources to respond to the attacks. **So here 's what I'm asking: will you chip in today to help Patrick take on DeSantis and his wealthy backers?** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ **[Chip in $5 immediately>>](http://act.murphyforflorida. name: Hillary Clinton
subject: I'm asking you to add your name
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
An important step forward: | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI2MDM0NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNTQzODQwS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend --

When we talk about immigration reform, we can't forget who this debate is about: people who work hard, love this country, and dream of nothing more than building a future here for themselves and their families.

I want to help them fulfill their dreams.

That's why last night in Las Vegas, I talked with a group of DREAMers -- Americans in every way but citizenship papers, who have big plans to go to college, open small businesses, become doctors, start families -- and I committed to fight for comprehensive immigration reform.

We should stop pretending we are going to deport 11 million people. We can no longer treat millions of Americans as second class citizens.

**I'm ready to do what it takes to fix our broken immigration system. Fight for this with me -- add your name right now:
**
**[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/immigration-reform/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjI2MDM0NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNTQzODQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

The amazing people I sat with last night -- Erika, Betsaida, Blanca, Rafael, Juan, Victoria, and Astrid -- are a reminder that there are real people and real families behind this issue. But it's not just about their families. It's about all of us.

I hope you'll stand with me.

Hillary [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjI2MDM0NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNTQzODQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjI2MDM0NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNTQzODQwS0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjI2MDM0NTcS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTYwNTQzODQwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
